evals.name: Clean text file ingest produces wiki page with correct frontmatter
evals.prompt: I just dropped a new article about distributed systems into the inbox. Please ingest it into the vault.
evals.expected_output: A wiki page is created with correct frontmatter (type: source, title field), wikilinks to related pages, index.md updated, log entry with +page prefix, and the original moved to a PARA folder

files.content:
# Understanding Distributed Systems

Distributed systems are collections of independent computers that appear to users as a single system.

## Key Concepts
- CAP theorem
- Eventual consistency
- Partition tolerance

## References
- Designing Data-Intensive Applications by Martin Kleppmann

assertions.text: A new wiki page is created in the wiki directory with a date-prefixed slug filename (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD-distributed-systems.md)
The wiki page has YAML frontmatter with 'type: source' and a 'title' field
The wiki page contains at least one [[wikilink]] to a related existing or new page
The index file is updated with an entry for the new wiki page in the format '- [[page-name]] -- summary'
A log entry is appended with the format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | +page | page-name | created from distributed-systems-article.md'
The original file is moved from inbox to a PARA folder (not deleted, not left in inbox)
The original source file content is not modified during the ingest process

evals.name: Credential file detected and routed to secure folder
evals.prompt: There's a new file in the inbox. Please ingest all inbox files into the vault.
evals.expected_output: The credential file is detected, NOT turned into a wiki page, moved to the credentials folder, and a !cred warning is logged

files.content:
# AWS Configuration

aws_access_key_id = AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
aws_secret_access_key = wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY

Region: us-east-1
Output: json

assertions.text: The agent identifies the file as containing credentials (AWS access key pattern matched)
No wiki page is created for this file — credential content never enters the wiki
The file is moved to the configured credentials_folder path
A log entry is created with '!cred' prefix indicating credential detection
Ingestion is stopped for this specific file but other non-credential inbox files can still be processed

evals.name: Query produces synthesized answer with wikilink citations
evals.prompt: What do I know about distributed systems and their trade-offs? Synthesize an answer from my vault.
evals.expected_output: A synthesized answer citing relevant wiki pages via [[wikilinks]], distinguishing facts from inference

assertions.text: The agent reads index.md to identify relevant pages before reading individual pages
The answer contains at least one [[wikilink]] citation to a source page
The answer is a synthesis across multiple pages, not a copy-paste from a single page
The query uses only Read, Glob, and Grep tools — no Obsidian app or CLI calls
A log entry with '?query' prefix is created documenting the query

evals.name: Lint detects orphan wiki page not in index
evals.prompt: Run a health check on my vault to find any organizational issues.
evals.expected_output: Lint report identifies the orphan page as an error-severity finding with a fix suggestion to add it to index.md

files.content:
---
type: concept
title: "Orphan Topic"
---

This page exists but is not listed in index.md.

assertions.text: The lint report identifies orphan-topic.md as an orphan page not listed in index.md
The orphan finding is categorized as 'error' severity
The report includes an actionable fix suggestion (e.g., add [[orphan-topic]] to index.md)
A log entry with '!lint' prefix is created with a summary of findings
The agent runs scripts/lint-check.sh for deterministic checks before performing LLM analysis

evals.name: Scheduled run with empty inbox skips ingest and logs completion
evals.prompt: Run obsidian-brain scheduled maintenance on the vault.
evals.expected_output: Pre-flight checks pass, ingest is skipped (empty inbox), index rebuild runs, and completion is logged

assertions.text: Pre-flight check verifies vault accessibility and inbox count before proceeding
Ingest is skipped because the inbox is empty (zero files)
The index rebuild step runs via scripts/update-index.sh regardless of inbox state
A log entry records the start of the scheduled run
A log entry records the completion of the scheduled run with summary (0 ingested, index rebuilt)
The run produces at least a start and completion log entry — no silent pass-through
